prompt: Build a 5-slide IBM Carbon proposal deck using the hybrid approach. Title: 'Technology Services Proposal'. Slide 1: HTML capture title slide using the bundled capture-title.mjs script — embed as full-bleed PNG. Slide 2: 'The Challenge' with 4 risk/challenge cards in a 2×2 grid, each with left vertical gradient accent bars and icons. Slide 3: 'Value Proposition' with 3 pillar cards showing what the service delivers. Slide 4: 'Pre-requisites' with 4 narrow columns — the last card should be highlighted as REQUIRED with a filled badge, tinted background, and colored border. Slide 5: HTML capture closing/thank-you slide as full-bleed PNG. Output as 'technology-services-proposal.pptx'.

assertions.text: Output file technology-services-proposal.pptx exists and is valid
Slides 1 and 5 use addImage with full-bleed dimensions (w:10, h:5.625) for HTML-captured PNGs
Uses capture-title.mjs script (or equivalent HTML capture) for title and closing slides
Challenge slide uses 2×2 grid layout with vertical gradient accent bars
Prerequisites slide has a REQUIRED badge (ROUNDED_RECTANGLE with filled accent color and white text)
Mandatory/required card has tinted background color and colored border (line property)
No # prefix on pptxgenjs color values
slide.background set to white on content slides
